title: Kulupu Pali
description: Lightweight Fabric modpack for distribution to semi-public server
body:
*kulupu*
- community, group, society

*pali*
- do, action, work, build, make, prepare

This is a lightweight modpack with a focus on custom content and performance for a semi-public server in initial stages of production.

1.0.0 does not include final KubeJS scripts and content. Initial performance and content mods are included.
